title: senecio tuberculatus
intro: Senecio tuberculatus is a plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae, native to North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly the presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Senecio tuberculatus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and liver damage risks.
